message:
fix(web): Address critical bugs found in deep code review

## GPU Compute (race condition fix)
- Add proper async initialization with ready() promise
- Wait for init before countKmers() execution
- Add try-finally for GPU buffer cleanup on errors

## React Hooks (memory leak fixes)
- useSimulation: Add mounted checks before state updates in async callbacks
- Prevent setState calls after component unmount

## Database (error handling)
- IndexedDB: Add transaction.onerror and transaction.onabort handlers
- Prevent promise hangs when transactions fail/abort
- Add safeJsonParse helper to both bun-repository and SqlJsRepository
- Wrap all JSON.parse calls with fallback defaults

## Web Workers (robustness)
- search.worker: Add try-catch error boundary, return empty results on error
- comparison.worker: Validate input before processing
- comparison.worker: Validate ArrayBuffer before transfer

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
